title: subagent-toolkit manifest
description: Output of `python3 harness/scripts/manifest.py <root>`. Deliberately tolerant (additionalProperties: true) so new emitted fields can be added without breaking consumers.

root.description: Absolute path of the toolkit checkout that was scanned.

warnings.description: Lint warnings. Present only when at least one item has missing or invalid frontmatter. `manifest.py --check` exits non-zero when this is non-empty.

info.description: Softer lint notes (e.g. missing optional frontmatter keys). Present only when non-empty; never fails `--check`.

path.description: Path to SKILL.md, relative to root.

resources.description: Bundled reference/script files, relative to root.

version.description: The skill's frontmatter metadata.version, flattened. Present only when the skill declares one.

path.description: Path to the role file, relative to root.

recommended_capability_profile.description: One of: coordinator | readonly | sandbox | external (free text tolerated for older checkouts).

path.description: Path to the template, relative to root.
